nodes.label: Batch Certificate Generation
nodes.rationale: Certificates are generated in bulk from a template plus CSV/Excel rows and saved together in a ZIP so organizers can issue many personalized certificates at once instead of one-by-one.

nodes.label: Static Text Elements
nodes.rationale: Titles, dates, and signature lines with full font/color/size control are supported without requiring a data file, so the tool works even before any CSV/Excel is uploaded.

nodes.label: Automatic Project Saving
nodes.rationale: The project is persisted to the browser so users can close the tab and resume later, protecting long design sessions from accidental loss.

nodes.label: Row-by-Row Live Preview
nodes.rationale: Users can step through recipients before generating, catching layout/data problems prior to a bulk export.

nodes.label: Unified Elements Panel
nodes.rationale: Text, images, and stamps are managed in one unified panel instead of separate scattered controls.

nodes.label: GitHub Pages Deployment
nodes.rationale: The app lives in the sinaa/ subfolder; deployment works either via GitHub Actions or branch deploy, and the root index.html redirects visitors to /sinaa/ so the repo root can be served directly.
